title: Archived v0.5.0 current-state snapshot
source: README.md before v0.6 documentation refresh plus ADR 0007
summary: v0.5.0 browser Personal Voice Model infrastructure with local-first speech, enrollment, vocabulary, browser-training, encrypted portability, privacy, and release guardrails.
persistentPrimaryDestinations: v0.5 UI surfaces were feature panels rather than the v0.6 Dictate/Vocabulary/Models shell.
evidenceBoundaries: ADR 0004 blocks production Personal Voice Model accuracy claims without user-approved cohort evidence.
ADR 0005 blocks production reference-hardware performance claims without declared benchmark evidence.
Synthetic fixtures, CI smoke tests, diagnostics, and contract tests are regression evidence only.
archivePurpose: Keep a concise v0.5 baseline reference after README and current-state docs move to the v0.6 task-first UI.
